config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: This is because we want to keep up with other people who love this way…but I can’t explain why they don't seem so willing for us to say that if you have something else at hand then some might be looking forward to using them too – even though many things may make sense (such an attempt seems unlikely).

generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: Did, Can, Fortunately, Luckily, Does, Altern, An, Sure, Sometimes, Interestingly, Thankfully, Isn

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: Did, Can, Fortunately, Luckily, Does, Altern, An, Sure, Sometimes, Interestingly, Thankfully, Isn

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer. This is because we want to keep up with other people who love this way…but I can’t explain why they don't seem so willing for us to say that if you have something else at hand then some might be looking forward to using them too – even though many things may make sense (such an attempt seems unlikely).

records.output_text: For example, there's nothing much like ‐yourself and others think about what your self looks like from afar — whether it was on public transport or just around town …or whatever world those two mean? When talking about everything really helps me feel more positive when thinking about how big my own life has become over time but where does everyone actually stand compared today? Let me ask out one question myself; while most readers would never imagine someone having anything negative towards themselves being able to hold onto their lives without such constant pressure placed upon all aspects within oneself - yet again! And finally, no matter which
